genre_refs: Truth Social / X post screenshot card
description: A portrait graphic. The upper portion is a color photograph of President Donald Trump in a dark navy suit and red tie, wearing a red 'USA' '47' baseball cap, raising a clenched fist, lit by low-angle sun, with a blurred American flag behind him. Across the middle in very large white serif (Trajan-style) capital letters is the headline 'GREAT JOBS NUMBERS'. Below is an embedded white quote-card styled as a Trump social-media post: a flag-overlaid circular Trump avatar, 'Donald J. Trump' with a verified badge and app icon, '@realDonaldTrump', then post text whose opening line is highlighted in yellow: 'Just in: GREAT JOBS NUMBERS, FAR GREATER THAN EXPECTED!' continuing 'The United States of America should be paying MUCH LESS on its Borrowings (BONDS!). We are again the strongest Country in the World, and should therefore be paying the LOWEST INTEREST RATE, by far. This would be an INTEREST COST SAVINGS OF AT LEAST ONE TRILLION DOLLARS PER YEAR - BALANCED BUDGET, PLUS. WOW! The Golden Age of America is upon us!!! President DJT'. At the bottom is the engraved White House logomark and 'The WHITE HOUSE' wordmark.
notable_text: GREAT JOBS NUMBERS / Just in: GREAT JOBS NUMBERS, FAR GREATER THAN EXPECTED! ... The Golden Age of America is upon us!!! President DJT / The WHITE HOUSE
